REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:19+3=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:18+-2=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:12+-2=10 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Kobold — Winged Striker.
→ Javelin: [d20:14+6=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 10 damage. Kobold — Winged Striker HP: 57/67
REASONING: Throwing rock at Kobold — Winged Striker (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:5+9=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 29 damage. Kobold — Winged Striker HP: 28/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
